title: Sweet Sea Bass with Treat Glaze
description: A healthy and flavorful vegan recipe that combines the delicate taste of sea bass with the sweetness of treat.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and grease with a non-stick spray.
Place the sea bass fillets on the prepared baking sheet.
In a small bowl, mix together the treat and sweet.
Brush the glaze evenly over the sea bass fillets.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through and flakes easily with a fork.
